input.background: Suppose a high school population has 600 students and you want to choose three students at random from this population.
input.question: How do you use Table A to select random numbers for the sample?

output.answer: Enter Table $A$ at (say) line 15. Line 15 starts with these digits: $$ \begin{array}{lllll} 76931 & 95289 & 55809 & 19381 & 56686 \end{array} $$
